title: cyanus woronowii
intro: Cyanus woronowii, also known as the cornflower, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyanus woronowii include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and soothing digestive issues. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, as well as in the form of tinctures and salves, to leverage its medicinal properties.
